title: mfa — product analytics
description: Product-analytics events for the MFA surface. Distinct from OpenTelemetry metrics: analytics feed product+growth dashboards (segmented by identity fingerprint under 'functional' consent tier), while metrics feed operational dashboards (aggregate-only). No PII on any event.

events.name: MFA Enrollment Preview Started
events.description: Round 1 of enrolment. method=totp|webauthn. Drives the enrolment-funnel dashboard (preview → confirm conversion rate).

events.name: MFA Enrollment Completed
events.description: Round 2 succeeded. Drives the enrolment-funnel completion rate + time-to-enroll dashboards.

events.name: MFA Enrollment Abandoned
events.description: Round 2 failed OR the preview expired. reason=confirmation_code_invalid|preview_expired|preview_missing|attestation_verification_failed|duplicate_credential. Signals friction in the enrolment UX.

events.name: MFA Challenge Attempted
events.description: One challenge verification. outcome=verified|invalid|expired. context=login|step_up (distinguishes initial-login MFA from mid-session step-up).

events.name: MFA Recovery Code Consumed
events.description: User fell back to a recovery code. Signals primary-factor loss OR credential migration event.

events.name: WebAuthn Credential Registered
events.description: New credential registered. credential_count_after = the total active credentials for this Identity after the registration. Drives the multi-device-adoption dashboard.

events.name: MFA Step-Up Prompted
events.description: mfa.require_recent_challenge middleware rejected a sensitive action. action_id = the target the caller was trying to invoke. Signals sensitive-action volume for the CX team.

notes: `identity_fingerprint` is a SHA-256 of the identity_id, NOT the identity_id itself. Segments the event by Identity without exposing the underlying ULID to downstream analytics tooling.

None of these events carry email, dob, IP, user-agent, device_name, credential_id, or public-key material. If a downstream dashboard needs enrolment breakdown by geography, resolve country_code at the collector layer (before persisting) and pass ONLY the country_code.
